auth.label: API Key
auth.description: IP2Location.io API key passed with the key query parameter. Sign up for the Free Plan to get one: https://www.ip2location.io/ip2location-documentation

actions.name: get_domain_whois
actions.description: Retrieve WHOIS registration details for one domain.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one domain WHOIS lookup.

domain_id.description: The registry identifier returned by IP2WHOIS.

anyOf.description: One domain status string returned by IP2WHOIS.

items.description: One domain status string returned by IP2WHOIS.

anyOf.description: The domain statuses returned by IP2WHOIS.

status.description: The domain status or statuses returned by IP2WHOIS.

domain_age.description: The age of the domain in days.

iana_id.description: The registrar IANA identifier returned by IP2WHOIS.

name.description: The registrar name returned by IP2WHOIS.

url.description: The registrar website URL returned by IP2WHOIS.

name.description: The contact name returned by the WHOIS record.

organization.description: The organization name returned by the WHOIS record.

street_address.description: The street address returned by the WHOIS record.

city.description: The city returned by the WHOIS record.

region.description: The region, state, or province returned by the WHOIS record.

zip_code.description: The postal code returned by the WHOIS record.

country.description: The country code returned by the WHOIS record.

phone.description: The phone number returned by the WHOIS record.

fax.description: The fax number returned by the WHOIS record.

email.description: The email address returned by the WHOIS record.

actions.name: get_ip_geolocation
actions.description: Retrieve geolocation and network metadata for one IPv4 or IPv6 address.

anyOf.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.
The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.

lang.description: The IP2Location-supported language code for translated place names, including regional variants such as zh-cn and zh-tw.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one IP geolocation lookup.

time_zone.description: The UTC offset returned by IP2Location.io.

domain.description: The primary domain associated with the IP.

net_speed.description: The connection speed category returned by IP2Location.io.

usage_type.description: The IP usage type returned by IP2Location.io.

is_proxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

outputSchema.description: The IP geolocation payload returned by IP2Location.io.

actions.name: list_hosted_domains
actions.description: List the hosted domains associated with one IPv4 or IPv6 address.

anyOf.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.
The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one hosted domains lookup.

total_domains.description: The total number of hosted domains.

per_page.description: The number of domains returned per page.

total_pages.description: The total number of result pages.

domains.description: The hosted domain names returned for the queried IP.

outputSchema.description: The hosted domains lookup payload returned by IP2WHOIS.
